scripts.generate:medications: node scripts/convert_amm_xlsx_to_json.cjs && node scripts/generate_dosage_templates.cjs && node scripts/generate_interactions.cjs
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/convert_amm_xlsx_to_json.cjs && node scripts/generate_dosage_templates.cjs && node scripts/generate_interactions.cjs
scripts.test:rules: npx --yes firebase-tools@15.22.3 emulators:exec --project demo-ordomed --only firestore "node --test tests/firestore.rules.test.mjs"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:classification && npm run test:templates && npm run test:search && npm run test:rules && npm run build
